title: Decken’s Threat Reaches the Tower
description: On pages 10–13, this part follows Narrator, Unknown person #1, Royal Guards, King Neptune, Fukaboshi, Shirahoshi, Luffy. The core story beat is decken’s threat reaches the tower.
scene: The scene centers on decken’s threat reaches the tower, with Narrator, Unknown person #1, Royal Guards, King Neptune, Fukaboshi, Shirahoshi, Luffy driving the moment.

dialogue.speaker: Queen Otohime
dialogue.text: When the sun shines upon the surface, we too are blessed with its rays...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even in this Undersea world, we are able to live a natural life, governed by the sun up above!!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: Could it be connected to the "Treasure Tree Adam" whose wood was used to make the sunny?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The "Suntree Eve"...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I'll have to ask frankly about this!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hey, shaggy old dude. I'm hungry.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You..!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hohoho ohoh... We will arrive presently...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The entrance is ahead of us now.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hello?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It is I!!

dialogue.speaker: Royal Guards
dialogue.text: Y... your majesty!! I will lower the entryway at once!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Now, onward we go!! Neptuuune!!

dialogue.speaker: Royal Guards
dialogue.text: A Royal Palace... I can't wait!()

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hoeee Eell!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Keep your bubbles on tight!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ahhh!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We have arrived!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: OHHHH, WOW!! It's awesome!!! So cool!!!

dialogue.speaker: Camie
dialogue.text: It makes Pappaggasan's mansion look like a flea!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Don't compare them!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: His majesty has returned!! Open the gate!!

dialogue.speaker: Royal Guards
dialogue.text: Royal Palace of the Kyuquuquui Kingdom Kyuuquui Palace

dialogue.speaker: Royal Guards
dialogue.text: King Neptunee has returned!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: where on earth has he been...?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What a beautiful Palace!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The Gates will now be opened!!

dialogue.speaker: Royal Guards
dialogue.text: Welcome home, your majesty!!

dialogue.speaker: King Neptune
dialogue.text: Wooooow!! There's so much going on!! What a fun- looking palaceeeeee!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: This is my home!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Feel free to make yourselves comfortable!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: How many times must you be told?! You must learn to consider your station!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Again you leave the castle unannounced!! Descending to the lower waters without to much as a retainer by your side!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Oh Dearie me...

dialogue.speaker: King Neptune
dialogue.text: If something were to happen to you out there, it would be too late for apologies!! Do you not understand what kind of state this kingdom is in?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...I'm sorry... I'm sorry...... I will be more careful in future...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: He got scolded...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hmmm...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: At any rate...!! I have brought the individuals responsible for saving Megalo from his troubles with the kraken!!

dialogue.speaker: King Neptune
dialogue.text: See to it that they are properly welcomed! Where is the princess? Where is Princess Shirahoshioshoshosh?!

dialogue.speaker: Royal Guards
dialogue.text: ...Well, you see, your majesty, it seems to have happened again...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Somewhere, because you should

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: OutrageOUS!! This only happens because you fools do not properly guard her so as to keep her from worrying!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Can you not see that your sudden disappearance in such circumstances serves only to spread unrest and concern throughout the entire palace?! At any rate...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...I'm sorry... I will be more careful in future...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: He got scolded again...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Royal Guards
dialogue.text: It pains me to trouble your majesty immediately upon your arrival with these guests, but there is an important matter that requires your attention!!

dialogue.speaker: Fukaboshi
dialogue.text: Indeed... we have just received word from Prince Fukaboshi, you see...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Oh dear, oh dearie me....!!!

dialogue.speaker: King Neptune
dialogue.text: Rylugulu kingdom MINISTER OF THE RIGHT (seahorse merman)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hmm?

dialogue.speaker: King Neptune
dialogue.text: Ryluguu kingdom Minister of the Left (Catfish Merman)

dialogue.speaker: Fukaboshi
dialogue.text: from Fukaboshi...? What is this about?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Well, you see...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: When are we going to be properly welcomed..?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hmm? Where's Luffy?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: He was with us until a moment ago...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Honestly... can't he stay still for a single minute...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What does he think he's doing, wandering off in this sacred place?!

summary: Decken’s Threat Reaches the Tower. This part advances the crew from their post-timeskip reunion into the undersea route and the first conflicts surrounding Fish-Man Island.
